Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Combat Artist]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The narrator casts a spell at the Combat Artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 13''' — The Combat Artist is a destroyer-class threat in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 31''' — Combat Artists are high-level magic users.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 11''' — Watching a single Combat Artist fight an entire crowd does not look like it does in Subline films.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — The rabbit is a Combat Artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 13''' — A Combat Artist can be nine feet tall and Karoshan.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 1''' — Combat Artist is a skill possessed by Kyri Prest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 12''' — A Combat Artist is a type of fighter or role.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 26''' — Combat Artists are experienced individuals characterized by intentional movements.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Combat Artists are fighters who avoid facing mages in the ring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 30''' — Combat Artists attacked Varic with devastating blows.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 1''' — There are at least fifty Combat Artists on the planet where Aila is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — Combat Artists of the Lagomorph Contract are muscled individuals who take point in combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 43''' — Lutoch is not a Combat Artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 45''' — Combat Artists are personnel prepared for boarders.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
